headlines.title: Tennessee Republicans pass map dividing up state’s lone majority-Black district
headlines.description: Tennessee’s Republican-led Legislature passed a new congressional map dividing up the state’s lone majority-Black district, swiftly responding to the U.S.

headlines.title: Kamala Harris wants the DNC to release its autopsy report on the 2024 campaign
headlines.description: Amid turmoil over the party’s future, Kamala Harris has been privately sounding out confidants about her own prospects.

headlines.title: U.S. strikes at least two locations in Iran, American official says
headlines.description: The U.S. conducted strikes against at least two locations in Iran Thursday, a U.S. official said.

headlines.title: Sen. Susan Collins reveals ‘benign’ tremor, says it hasn’t affected her job or how she feels
headlines.description: The 73-year-old Republican from Maine has served in the Senate since 1997 and is seeking a sixth term in November. She said her condition is “extremely common.”

headlines.title: Iran-backed groups targeted U.S. facilities in Iraq 600 times, U.S. official says
headlines.description: The U.S. is urging the government to break with Tehran-backed militia groups following more than 600 attacks against U.S. diplomatic facilities.

headlines.title: Source: DOJ investigating suspicious oil trades timed around Iran war
headlines.description: The Justice Department is investigating a series of oil market trades that right before important moves related to the war with Iran. At least four trades worth $2.6 billion are being examined. NBC News’ Allie Canal explains the timing of the bets.

headlines.title: Xavier Becerra criticized for his record as Biden HHS secretary in CA gov debate
headlines.description: NBC4 Los Angeles chief political reporter Conan Nolan joins Meet the Press NOW after moderating the California gubernatorial and Los Angeles mayoral debates Wednesday night.

headlines.title: Sen. Collins says her benign essential tremor is ‘extremely common’
headlines.description: Sen. Susan Collins, R-Maine, shared that she has a benign essential tremor, which she called an “extremely common condition.” WCSH’s Phil Hirschkorn details the condition and its side effects.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: The front-runners to lead Bernie Sanders' grassroots movement in 2028
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: Anger and despair among Jewish Britons after spate of attacks
headlines.description: LONDON — Britain in 2026 is a place where Jack Hur doesn’t feel safe wearing his Star of David pendant.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.
